languages.text: "Как смеет он сравнивать нашу чистую веру с его искаженной ересью?! Быть может, мы одинаково трепещем пред Кошмарами и раньше жили в одном мире... Однако сие не делает нас равными! Да я лучше сгину в лапах чудовища, чем признаю его братом!"

traits.locale_text: "Как смеет он сравнивать нашу чистую веру с его искаженной ересью?! Быть может, мы одинаково трепещем пред Кошмарами и раньше жили в одном мире... Однако сие не делает нас равными! Да я лучше сгину в лапах чудовища, чем признаю его братом!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"
languages.original_text: "Как смеет он сравнивать нашу чистую веру с его искаженной ересью?! Быть может, мы одинаково трепещем пред Кошмарами и раньше жили в одном мире... Однако сие не делает нас равными! Да я лучше сгину в лапах чудовища, чем признаю его братом!"

traits.locale_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Wie kann er es wagen, unseren reinen Glauben mit seiner verdrehten Ketzerei zu vergleichen?! Wir mögen den Albträumen genauso hilflos ausgeliefert sein und wir teilen dieselbe Welt... Aber das macht uns nicht gleich! Ich würde eher in den Klauen eines Monsters mein Ende finden, als ihn einen Bruder zu nennen!"
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"

languages.text: "Comment ose-t-il comparer notre foi pure à son hérésie tordue ? ! Nous sommes peut-être aussi impuissants l'un que l'autre face aux Cauchemars et nous partageons le même monde... Mais cela ne nous rend pas égaux ! Je préférerais finir entre les griffes d'un monstre plutôt que de l'appeler mon frère !"
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"

languages.text: "他怎么敢把我们纯洁的信仰 和他扭曲的异端邪说相提并论？我们也许在噩梦面前同样无助，我们曾经共享同一个世界......但这并不意味着我们是平等的我宁愿死在怪物的魔爪下 也不愿和他称兄道弟！"
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"

languages.text: "¡¿Cómo se atreve a comparar nuestra fe pura con su retorcida herejía?! Puede que seamos igual de indefensos ante las Pesadillas y que compartamos el mismo mundo... ¡Pero eso no nos hace iguales! Antes encontraría mi fin en las garras de un monstruo que llamarle hermano".
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"

languages.text: 「私たちの純粋な信仰と、彼の歪んだ異端を比べてどうするんだ？私たちは悪夢の前では無力で、同じ世界を共有している。だが、だからといって対等ではない！彼を兄弟と呼ぶくらいなら、怪物に捕まって最期を迎える方が早い！"
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"

languages.text: "Bizim saf inancımızı kendi sapkın sapkınlığıyla karşılaştırmaya nasıl cüret eder?! Kabuslar karşısında eşit derecede çaresiz olabiliriz ve aynı dünyayı paylaşıyor olabiliriz... Ama bu bizi eşit yapmaz! Ona kardeşim diyeceğime, sonumu bir canavarın pençesinde bulurum daha iyi!"
languages.original_text: "How dares he compare our pure faith to his twisted heresy?! We may be are equally helpless before the Nightmares and we use to share the same world... But it does not make us equal! I would sooner find my end in a monster's clutches than call him a brother!"
